creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ler
Date: Sun Apr 30 22:09:42 UTC 2017
New revision: 439853
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/439853

Log:
  sysutils/i7z: Migrate port to GitHub and take maintainership

  Maintainer hasn't responded to numerous PR's over the last 3.5 years,
  and the port was scheduled for expiration.

  Give to new volunteer.

  PR:		218942
  Submitted by:	dim@FreeBSD.org
  Approved by:	adamw (mentor, implicit)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/i7z/Makefile
  head/sysutils/i7z/distinfo
  head/sysutils/i7z/files/
  head/sysutils/i7z/pkg-descr
